message:
bd-3bxhj.5.5: Add InteractiveStyle, OverflowBehavior, and WrapMode::Optimal

Extend style/layout/text crates with migration-critical capabilities:

- ftui-style: InteractiveStyle with CSS pseudo-class semantics
  (Normal/Hovered/Focused/Active/Disabled/FocusedHovered) and
  state-based style resolution via Style::patch cascading (14 tests)
- ftui-layout: OverflowBehavior enum (Clip/Visible/Scroll/Wrap) on
  both Flex and Grid with builder methods and accessor
- ftui-text: WrapMode::Optimal variant wiring wrap_text_optimal
  (Knuth-Plass) into the standard wrap_with_options dispatch;
  styled Line::wrap falls back to greedy word-wrap for Optimal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
